title: Generate a Floor Plan with Multiple Rooms and Doorways
scenario: Create a prompt that instructs an LLM to generate a floor plan of a house with multiple rooms and doorways. The floor plan should include dimensions, room labels, and a clear layout. The output should be a PDF document.
constraints: Must use a 2D floor plan layout
Must use a metric unit of measurement

evaluationCriteria.description: The accuracy of the room layout, including dimensions and doorways.
The quality of the PDF document, including layout, font, and image resolution.
Whether the output adheres to all specified constraints.
